summary: End-to-end testing of HealthBridge Vault (FastAPI backend + Expo/React Native frontend) on the preview URL. 18 backend pytest cases (auth, watches, metrics, sync prefs, conflict policy, audit log, vault export) all passing. Frontend smoke tested across onboarding → login → dashboard → watches toggle → sync prefs/policy → vault unlock+export → settings sign-out, plus register validation + success. All critical testIDs render and interactions persist via API.

issues: Two deprecation console warnings: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' from LinearGradient usages (onboarding hero overlay, vault image overlay, watch card glow). Non-blocking but should be migrated to style.pointerEvents for SDK 54 compliance.

action_items: Optional: replace `pointerEvents="none"` props with `style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}` on LinearGradient/Image overlays to clear RN web deprecation warnings (onboarding.tsx, vault.tsx, watches.tsx).

Native HealthKit / Health Connect / Samsung Health bridges remain INTENTIONALLY MOCKED per spec — config-only; no native wiring shipped. Confirm this is acceptable for the MVP scope before marking complete.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses Pydantic EmailStr which (correctly) rejects RFC reserved TLDs like `.test` and `.localhost`. Worth documenting for QA so test emails use real-looking TLDs (e.g. example.com).
`@app.on_event('startup')` is deprecated in FastAPI ≥0.110 in favor of lifespan handlers. Works fine today; consider migration when bumping FastAPI.
Watches toggle does not validate platform; relies on user_id+watch_id uniqueness which is OK.
All MongoDB queries already exclude `_id` — no ObjectId leakage.
Frontend api/client.ts handles 401 → refresh once, correct pattern.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical flows after viewport/timing adjustments

seed_data_creation: demo@healthbridge.app / Demo1234! created via /api/auth/register on first test run; seeds 2 watches, 8 metric summaries, 8 sync prefs, conflict policy and 12 audit events. Idempotent re-runs use login.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use BASE_URL=https://cross-health-sync.preview.emergentagent.com. Demo creds prefilled on login screen. For Playwright tab navigation use route URLs (/sync, /vault, /settings) — `text=` selectors collide with body labels. Lock-btn in vault sits at bottom of ScrollView; use scroll_into_view_if_needed.
rca_of_issue: No production bugs. Two initial test-script failures (vault-lock-btn off-screen, register navigation race) resolved by scrolling into view and waiting for testID selector instead of generic text match.
